title: Lightly Candied Croatian Turnips Stir-Fry
description: A flavorful and herbal stir-fry featuring light-caramelized turnips that are perfect for a quick weeknight meal.

ingredients.name: Celtic sea salt or Kosher salt

instructions: Peel the turnips, cut into thin slices.
Cut garlic cloves thinly and set aside.
Slice green onions finely. Adjust quantity based on desired flavor intensity.
Heat oil in a wok or large skillet over medium-high heat. Add sliced turnips and sauté for about 5 minutes until tender but still crisp.
Add minced garlic and stir-fry for another minute until fragrant.
Stir in green onions, season with salt and pepper to taste, then cook for an additional minute allowing flavors to meld together.
Optional: Sprinkle with Celtic sea salt or Kosher salt just before serving for extra crunch and flavor.
